nasb.text: In the same region there were some shepherds staying out in the fields and keeping watch over their flock by night.

esv.text: And in the same region there were shepherds out in the field, keeping watch over their flock by night.

cnv.text: 在伯利恆的郊外，有一些牧人在夜間看守羊群。

ccb.text: 当晚，伯利恒郊外有一群牧羊人正在看守羊群。

csbs.text: 当时在同一个地区，有些牧人露宿在野地里，夜间守更看守羊群。
